# How Well You Know

## About
How Well You Know is a platform that turns product documentation into 3-minute interactive challenges for B2B SaaS companies. It helps with customer onboarding, community engagement, lead generation, documentation enhancement, and feature adoption.

## Website
https://www.howwellyouknow.com

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://www.howwellyouknow.com
- Play Challenges: https://www.howwellyouknow.com/play
- How It Works: https://www.howwellyouknow.com/how-it-works
- Pricing: https://www.howwellyouknow.com/pricing
- Use Cases: https://www.howwellyouknow.com/use-cases

## Use Cases
- Customer Onboarding: https://www.howwellyouknow.com/use-cases/onboarding
- Community Engagement: https://www.howwellyouknow.com/use-cases/community
- Lead Generation: https://www.howwellyouknow.com/use-cases/marketing
- Documentation Enhancement: https://www.howwellyouknow.com/use-cases/documentation
- Product Teams: https://www.howwellyouknow.com/use-cases/product-teams

## Product
How Well You Know converts product knowledge into interactive challenges with 6 game rounds (Truth or Myth, This or That, Quick Pick, Speed Round, Odd One Out, Final Boss) and 15 questions per challenge. Players get a shareable scorecard with a radar chart showing their skill profile across 7 dimensions.

## Stats
- 25+ interactive challenges live
- 6,000+ players in week one
- 73% average completion rate
- ~3 minute average play time

## Pricing
- Free: 1 challenge, 10 cards
- Growth: $199/mo, 5 challenges, custom branding
- Scale: $349/mo, unlimited challenges, analytics, lead capture
- Enterprise: Custom pricing, SSO, API access, dedicated support

Email: hello@howwellyouknow.com
